question: Assuming today is Thursday of the current week, what is the approximate average energy usage for the entire week?

options.A: Unable to calculate, because usage for Friday to Sunday is not available
options.B: About 40 kWh, based only on the days with recorded usage
options.C: About 23 kWh, treating the missing days as 0 kWh
options.D: About 30 kWh, since the bars appear fairly high overall

explanation: The chart only shows measured values for the first part of the week; the remaining days are effectively missing, but are drawn as zero-height bars. Computing an average across all seven days (including those zeros) assumes the missing days truly had zero values, which is not supported by the data. Therefore the weekly average cannot be reliably calculated.
